debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
inst✝¹ : L.IsNormal
inst✝ : Consistent L
φ : Formula ℕ
hL : L ⊢ φ
hV : Modal.Ver ⊬ φ
Γ : List { ψ // ψ.isModalCNFPart }
γ : Formula ℕ
eγ : (⋀Γ.unattach).toFormula = γ
h : Modal.K ⊢ φ.toNNFormula.toFormula ⭤ γ
this : L ⊢ φ.toNNFormula.toFormula ⭤ γ
hγL : γ ∈ L
hγV : γ ∉ Modal.Ver
Δ : List { ψ // ψ.isPrebox ∨ ψ.isPredia ∨ ψ.degree = 0 }
hδΓ : ⟨⋁Δ.unattach, ⋯⟩ ∈ Γ
hδL : (↑⟨⋁Δ.unattach, ⋯⟩).toFormula ∈ L
hδV : (↑⟨⋁Δ.unattach, ⋯⟩).toFormula ∉ Modal.Ver
hΔ₁ : ∀ ψ ∈ Δ, ¬(↑ψ).isPrebox
⊢ ∃ Γ, L ⊢ φ ⭤ ⋀Γ

proof:
refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have : L ⊢ φ ⭤ φ := by
        simpa using (Entailment.Iff.refl (L := L) φ)
      exact this)
successful_attempts:
refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have : L ⊢ φ ⭤ φ := by
        simpa using (Entailment.Iff.refl (L := L) φ)
      exact this)

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have : L ⊢ φ ⭤ φ := by
        simpa using (Entailment.pbl (L := L) (φ := φ))
      simpa using this)

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have : L ⊢ φ ⭤ φ := by simpa using LO.Entailment.provable_iff.mpr Iff.rfl
      simpa)

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (LO.Entailment.pbl (L := L) (φ := φ ⭤ φ) (by simp))

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have : L ⊢ φ ⭤ φ := by simpa using (Entailment.iff_id (L := L) (φ := φ))
      simpa using this)

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have : L ⊢ φ ⭤ φ := by
        simpa using (LO.Entailment.iffId (L := L) (φ := φ))
      simpa using this)

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have : L ⊢ φ ⭤ φ := by simpa using (Entailment.iff_id : L ⊢ (φ ⭤ φ))
      simpa using this)

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have := (LO.Entailment.refl (L := L) (φ := φ))
      exact this)

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have : L ⊢ (φ ⭤ φ) := by
        simpa using (LO.Entailment.refl (L := L) (φ := φ))
      simpa)

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have h : L ⊢ φ ⭤ φ := by simpa using LO.Entailment.iff_refl (L := L) (φ := φ)
      simpa using h)

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by rfl : (φ ⭤ ⋀([φ] : List (Formula ℕ))) = (φ ⭤ φ))

refine ⟨[φ], ?_⟩
    simpa using (by
      have h : L ⊢ φ ⭤ φ := by
        simpa using (LO.Entailment.iff_refl (L := L) (φ := φ))
      exact h)
